ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the size standard is applicable */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size standard is designed */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size standard is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body measurement category */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the body measurement category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the body measurement category */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the body measurement category */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., UK 6, UK 8) */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement for the given size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size chart is applicable */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the size chart is applicable */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., Standard, Custom) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size chart entry is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES body_measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of clothing */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in inventory */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Store where the inventory is located */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the inventory */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., Available, Reserved, Out of Stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing style */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the style */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the style is designed */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the style is designed */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the style is designed */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the style is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing style */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Processing, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Store where the order was placed */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_standard" INTEGER /* Preferred size standard of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the customer */,
  "preferred_store_id" INTEGER /* Preferred store for the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_size_standard FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_standard") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)
